I personally used the Product ImagineGO (one of the products in their bundle) It's a very well designed product, took away the pain I was facing to generating image via midjourney on discord servers. ImagineGo gave me a very seamless experience for generating AI images via texts. Much better user experience than other AI image generators. Kudos to the developers of this product ! 👏🏻

Easily create generative AI apps and chatbots without writing a single line of code. Use data from websites, sitemaps, PDFs, and more. Bring your ideas to life by chaining LLMs, link data, and publish web apps and embeddable chatbots in a snap!

# Promptly Reviews

### The community submitted 5 reviews to tell us what they like about Promptly, what Promptly can do better, and more.

5.0

Based on 5 reviews

Review Promptly? [...] 5.0

Based on 5 reviews

Review Promptly?

Promptly is highly praised for its ease of use in creating generative AI apps and chatbots without coding. Users appreciate its ability to chain LLMs and utilize vector search, making it versatile for various applications. Feedback highlights the platform's potential for businesses and individuals lacking technical skills. Some users suggest improvements like better documentation and integration with tools like Zapier. Overall, Promptly is celebrated for its innovative approach and user-friendly interface, with makers receiving commendations for their efforts.
